items.title: rsv.repair by OTTOMATIC Introduced – Free Recovery Tool for Sony .RSV Files
items.summary: Created by DIT Ben Hager, lead developer at OTTOMATIC, rsv.repair is a third-party recovery tool that can help you fix interrupted recordings from your Sony camera. It’s completely free to use and wor…

items.title: Trail Camera Captures One of North America’s Most Elusive Mammals: The Ringtail
items.summary: Trail camera footage has captured one of the most elusive mammals in the Pacific Northwest region of the U.S. -- the ringtail. [Read More]

items.title: Authorities Seize Over 300 Drones at US World Cup Venues
items.summary: U.S. agencies have seized hundreds of drones near FIFA World Cup venues since the tournament ​began less than two weeks ago. [Read More]
